# Plug

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Plug;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Plug { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
electricity, energy, electronics, socket, outlet, power, voltage, current, charger

devices, development
